account.title: Connect Wonderfree account
account.description: Your account is used once to retrieve this fan's local key. The email, password, and cloud session are not stored.

reauth_confirm.title: Refresh local authentication
reauth_confirm.description: Sign in once to retrieve and verify a fresh local key. The email, password, and cloud session are not stored.

error.invalid_auth: Wonderfree rejected the email, password, or selected region.
error.device_not_found: This fan was not found in the selected Wonderfree account and region.
error.cloud_unavailable: Could not reach the selected Wonderfree region.
error.local_auth_failed: The key returned by Wonderfree could not authenticate with the fan on the local network.

abort.no_devices_found: No supported OmniBreeze Wonderfree fans were found.
abort.unknown: The config entry no longer exists.
